creator: billblake2018@gmail.com
text:
I'm getting similar messages.  My device:

iwm0: <Intel(R) Dual Band Wireless AC 9560> mem 0xf1110000-0xf1113fff at device 20.3 on pci0
iwm0: hw rev 0x310, fw ver 34.3125811985.0, address d0:ab:d5:a9:08:71

BTW, I got what I recall to be the same errors on a different machine.  I ignored them because I figured the hardware was going bad.  But since they're on the new machine as well, I assume it's a driver issue.  If memory serves, this only started with 14.0 or maybe 14.1.
